page: Microsoft Azure M416-208s_v2 is a memory-optimized server from the MSv2 family. It is powered by dedicated Intel Xeon 8280L processors utilizing the x86_64 architecture, delivering 208 vCPUs across 104 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled. The system operates at a base clock speed of 2.7 GHz and features a 38 MB L3 cache. It is equipped with 5700.0 GB of system memory, translating to 27.4 GB of RAM per core, and includes 8389 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability. No GPUs are present on this instance.

Benchmark data highlights a clear distinction between single-core and multi-core performance. While single-core metrics, such as stress-ng single-core CPU performance and single-threaded gzip compression, fall into the bottom 25%, the server excels in highly parallelized workloads. It achieves top-tier results in stress-ng multi-core CPU performance, Passmark CPU tests, and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression. Memory performance is exceptionally strong, with both cached and uncached read/write memory bandwidth benchmarks ranking in the top 10%. Additionally, the server demonstrates top-tier efficiency in Redis SET operations and strong throughput for static web serving.

Given its massive memory footprint and high vCPU count, the M416-208s_v2 represents a high-density hardware profile designed for enterprise-scale workloads. The qualitative cost efficiency is centered on consolidating massive databases and memory-intensive applications onto a single physical boundary rather than distributing them. The server is highly suited for large-scale relational databases, in-memory data stores like Redis, enterprise resource planning systems, and heavy data-warehousing workloads that require substantial RAM and high multi-threaded processing capabilities.
description: The Microsoft Azure M416-208s_v2 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server from the MSv2 family, featuring 208 vCPUs across 104 physical Intel Xeon 8280L cores running at 2.7 GHz. It is equipped with 5700.0 GB of RAM and 8389 GB of Premium Storage-capable local storage, with no GPU acceleration. While single-core benchmarks are relatively weak, the server delivers top-tier multi-core CPU performance and exceptional memory bandwidth in both cached and uncached operations. It also ranks in the top 10% for Redis SET operations and multi-threaded decompression. This high-density configuration is optimized for massive in-memory databases, large-scale enterprise workloads, and data-intensive applications requiring substantial memory capacity and parallel processing power.
og_description: Microsoft Azure M416-208s_v2 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server featuring 208 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 5700 GB of RAM, and 8389 GB of local storage, delivering top-tier multi-core and memory bandwidth performance.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure M416-208s_v2 is a memory-optimized server with 208 Intel vCPUs, 5.7 TB of RAM, and 8.3 TB of local storage for enterprise workloads.
tagline: A high-density, memory-optimized platform featuring massive RAM capacity and top-tier multi-core performance for enterprise database and in-memory workloads.
bullet_points: 208 vCPUs powered by Intel Xeon 8280L processors with dedicated allocation
5700.0 GB of RAM providing 27.4 GB of memory per physical core
8389 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
Top-tier multi-core CPU performance and memory bandwidth benchmarks
Excellent fit for massive in-memory databases and Redis deployments
